participants: 18-40 year old people who play video games
additional_comments: Part of the "open play" project; more video game and time use data and additional surveys available on Zenodo and GitHub (https://github.com/digital-wellbeing/open-play)

features.name: gaming_autonomy
features.details: I could play in the way I wanted.
features.labels:
1 = Strongly Disagree
4 = Neither Agree nor Disagree
7 =  Strongly agree

features.name: gaming_wish_else
features.details: I often found myself wishing I could do something else.
features.labels:
1 = Strongly Disagree
4 = Neither Agree nor Disagree
7 =  Strongly agree

features.name: gaming_progress
features.details: I felt that I made progress while playing.
features.labels:
1 = Strongly Disagree
4 = Neither Agree nor Disagree
7 =  Strongly agree

features.name: gaming_disappointed
features.details: I felt disappointed with my performance.
features.labels:
1 = Strongly Disagree
4 = Neither Agree nor Disagree
7 =  Strongly agree

features.name: gaming_relationships
features.details: I felt I formed relationships with other players and/or characters.
features.labels:
1 = Strongly Disagree
4 = Neither Agree nor Disagree
7 =  Strongly agree

features.name: gaming_toxic
features.details: Interactions with other players and/or characters felt toxic to me.
features.labels:
1 = Strongly Disagree
4 = Neither Agree nor Disagree
7 =  Strongly agree

features.name: social_singleplayer
features.details:
While gaming today, what kind of social interaction did you take part in?
Single-player games only

features.name: social_friends_realworld
features.details:
While gaming today, what kind of social interaction did you take part in? 
Multiplayer with real-world friends

features.name: social_friends_online
features.details:
While gaming today, what kind of social interaction did you take part in? 
Multiplayer with online-only friends

features.name: social_strangers
features.details:
While gaming today, what kind of social interaction did you take part in? 
Multiplayer with strangers

features.name: most_recent_game
features.details:
What is the name of the game you most recently played?
This text will be copied into certain other questions, so please write only the game name and use abbreviations if needed.

features.name: most_recent_game_plat
features.details: Which platform did this session take place on?

features.name: displaced_activity
features.details: Think back to your most recent gaming session. If you hadn't played a game, what would you most likely have done instead?

features.name: needs_autonomy_satisfied
features.details:
The next statements tap into your experiences today. Please indicate for each of the statements to what extent they are true for you.Today...
... I was able to do things that I really want and value in life.
features.labels:
1 = very strongly disagree
2 = strongly disagree
3 = disagree
4 = neither disagree nor agree
5 = agree
6 = strongly agree
7 = very strongly agree
features.construct: autonomy, self-determination, need satisfaction, basic psychological needs

features.name: needs_autonomy_frustrated
features.details:
The next statements tap into your experiences today. Please indicate for each of the statements to what extent they are true for you.Today...
... I felt forced to do many things I wouldn’t choose to do.
features.labels:
1 = very strongly disagree
2 = strongly disagree
3 = disagree
4 = neither disagree nor agree
5 = agree
6 = strongly agree
7 = very strongly agree
features.construct: self-determination, need frustration, basic psychological needs

features.name: needs_competence_satisfied
features.details:
The next statements tap into your experiences today. Please indicate for each of the statements to what extent they are true for you.Today...
... I could do things well and achieve my goals.
features.labels:
1 = very strongly disagree
2 = strongly disagree
3 = disagree
4 = neither disagree nor agree
5 = agree
6 = strongly agree
7 = very strongly agree
features.construct: competence, need satisfaction, competence satisfaction, mastery, self-efficacy, basic psychological needs

features.name: needs_competence_frustrated
features.details:
The next statements tap into your experiences today. Please indicate for each of the statements to what extent they are true for you.Today...
... I felt insecure about my abilities.
features.labels:
1 = very strongly disagree
2 = strongly disagree
3 = disagree
4 = neither disagree nor agree
5 = agree
6 = strongly agree
7 = very strongly agree
features.construct: competence, need satisfaction, competence satisfaction, insecurity, self-efficacy, basic psychological needs

features.name: needs_relatedness_satisfied
features.details:
The next statements tap into your experiences today. Please indicate for each of the statements to what extent they are true for you.Today...
... I felt close and connected with other people whom I care about and who care about me.
features.labels:
1 = very strongly disagree
2 = strongly disagree
3 = disagree
4 = neither disagree nor agree
5 = agree
6 = strongly agree
7 = very strongly agree
features.construct: relatedness, social connectedness, need satisfaction, basic psychological needs

features.name: needs_relatedness_frustrated
features.details:
The next statements tap into your experiences today. Please indicate for each of the statements to what extent they are true for you.Today...
... I felt excluded from the group I want to belong to.
features.labels:
1 = very strongly disagree
2 = strongly disagree
3 = disagree
4 = neither disagree nor agree
5 = agree
6 = strongly agree
7 = very strongly agree
features.construct: relatedness, social connectedness, social exclusion, need satisfaction, basic psychological needs

features.name: bpnsfs_dup_item
features.comments: One BPNSFS was duplicated for attention checking. See the manuscript describing the dataset for more details.

features.name: had_stress
features.details: Did anything happen to you in the last 24 hours that most people would consider stressful?
features.labels:
Yes
No

features.name: stress_events_argument
features.details: Argument or disagreement
features.construct: negative event, stress, argument, social stress, social conflict

features.name: stress_events_discrimination
features.details: Discrimination

features.details: Issue affecting a friend or relative

features.name: stress_events_other
features.details: Other

features.name: stress_events_work_school
features.details: Work or school issue

features.name: how_stressful_argument
features.details:
How stressful was this stressful event? 
Argument or disagreement
features.labels:
1 = not at all 
2 = not very 
3 = somewhat 
4 = very
features.construct: negative event, stress, argument, social stress, social conflict

features.name: affective_valence
features.details: How are you feeling right now?

features.name: life_satisfaction
features.details: I was satisfied with my life today.

features.name: day_type
features.details: Which best describes today for you?
features.labels:
Regular work day
Regular day off
Weekend
Holiday
Vacation day 
Other (please specify)

features.name: sleep_quality
features.details:
How do you rate the quality of your sleep?
"Sleep Quality" is your sense of whether you slept well or poorly.
features.labels:
very poor
poor
fair 
good 
very good
